productDisplayName: Nike Men's Hand Gang Sign Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionRoyal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the front, lettering on right sleeve and swoosh logo near hemline FittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Cool iron Tumble dry on low Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Get ready to score goals with this royal blue nike football tee.
